name: Signature Design by Ashley Forestmin Bookcase Brown/Black: Modern Ladder Style, 4 Fixed Open Shelves, Metal Frame
description: If you’ve got a penchant for urban eclectic design, this bookshelf has your name written all over it. The x-backed metal frame exudes stylish sturdiness, and four gallery shelves make storing books, succulents or picture frames an easy-breezy endeavor. Constructed of Solid and Engineered Wood in Medium Brown Finish and Gray Finished Metal. 4 Shelves. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
